sections.paragraph:
συνευδοκέω 1 aor. συνηυδόκησα (Polyb. 32, 6, 9; Diod S; SIG 712, 46; pap; 1 and 2 Macc) to join in approval, agree with, approve of, consent to, sympathize with w. dat. of pers. (BGU 834, 24 [II a.d.]) approve of someone Ro 1:32 (as TestAsh 6:2); 1 Cl 35:6. W. dat. of thing approve of, give approval to (BGU 1130, 3 [I b.c.]; POxy 504, 32; PGen 11, 3 al.; 1 Macc 1:57; 2 Macc 11:24) Lk 11:48; Ac 8:1; Dg 9:1. Abs. (Polyb. 23, 4, 13; Diod S 4, 24, 1; 11, 57, 5; BGU 1129, 6; 2 Macc 11:35) Ac 22:20. συνευδοκησάσης τῆς ἐκκλησίας πάσης with the consent of the whole assembly (church) 1 Cl 44:3. W. inf. foll. be willing to do someth. (PMich 202, 12 [105 a.d.]) 1 Cor 7:12f. W. dat. of pers., foll. by the acc. and inf. Hs 5, 2, 11. ταύτῃ τῇ γνώμῃ ὁ υἱὸς τοῦ δεσπότου συνηυδόκησεν αὐτῷ, ἵνα the son of the master agreed with him in this decision, namely that 5, 2, 8 (on the text, which may be corrupt, s. MDibelius, Hdb. ad loc.).—M-M.

aor. aor. = aorist

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

dat. dat. = dative

pers. pers. = person(s)

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

TestAsh TestAsh = Testament of Asher, s. Test12Patr—List 2

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

PGen PGen = Les Papyrus de Genève—List 4

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

Dg Dg = Letter of Diognetus, attributed to an unidentifiable apologist; II a.d.—List 1

inf. inf. = infinitive

foll. foll. = followed, following

someth. someth. = something

PMich PMich = Michigan Papyri—List 4

acc. acc. = accusative

Hs Hs = Similitudes

Hdb. Hdb. = Handbuch (in connection with a specific NT book, the ref. is to a commentary in the series Handbuch zum Neuen Testament, founded by HLietzmann)—List 6

ad ad loc. = ad locum (to or at the place under consideration)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 970
